examples: Michael: He is a bit of a loafer.
I will not be a mental loafer.
Kids making a bob-sledhave no use for the loafer who wants a free ride.
The year-and-a-half-old beasts, nearly as big as the petite 56-year-old, paw raw meat onto her tasseled loafer.
Germans gave us frankfurter, hamburger, delicatessen, sauerkraut, noodle, pumpernickel, pretzel, kindergarden, dunk, dumb, loafer, bum, gabfest and slugfest.
